interviewStages: Behavioral: customer focus, ownership, working at scale

coding: Given an array of integers, find the two numbers that add up to a target value. Talk through your approach, complexity, and edge cases.
Given a string, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters. Walk through your solution.
Design a data structure that supports insert, delete, and get-random in constant time. Explain your reasoning.
behavioral: Tell me about a time you disagreed with a teammate or manager. How did it resolve?
Describe a project that failed or fell short. What did you learn and change afterward?
Give me an example of when you took ownership of something outside your job description.
other: How does Quora compare to Reddit or Stack Overflow?

Quora Interview Guide (2026): Q&A Platform Engineering

Updated May 5, 2026 · techinterview.org

⏱ 1 min read

Quora
quora.com ↗

Quora is the largest knowledge Q&A platform — 400M+ monthly visitors. Founded by ex-Facebook engineers; engineering culture is famously rigorous. The interview emphasizes recommendation systems, content quality, and the unique ML challenges of matching questions to answerers.

Process

Recruiter screen → 60-minute coding phone (DSA medium-hard) → onsite virtual: 2 coding, 1 system design, 1 craft deep-dive, 1 behavioral. Cycle: 3–4 weeks.

What they actually ask

- Design a question-answerer matching system

- Design content ranking with quality and engagement signals

- Design Quora's Poe (LLM platform) bot ecosystem

- Coding: medium-hard DSA, often with graph or ML framing

- Behavioral: customer focus, ownership, working at scale

Levels and comp (2026)

- SE II: $160K–$200K total

- Senior SE: $230K–$310K

- Staff: $330K–$440K

- Principal: $460K–$620K

Prep priorities

- Be fluent in Python or C++ (the bulk of the codebase)

- Understand recommendation systems and ML for ranking

- Brush up on Poe / LLM API patterns

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Quora remote-friendly?

Distributed-first since 2020. ~400 employees globally.

How does Quora compare to Reddit or Stack Overflow?

Quora wins on broad-knowledge Q&A. Reddit on community discussion. Stack Overflow on technical Q&A. Quora is the smallest of the three by traffic but highest engagement per user.

What is the engineering bar?

High. Adam D'Angelo (founder, ex-Facebook CTO) set rigorous engineering culture. Strong ML focus given Poe.
